proof_environment.statement: Repository tests prove routing and adapter contracts. Production provider/model latency and artifact IDs require an authenticated VPS smoke run.

huggingface.detail: Task-filtered Hub discovery and router.huggingface.co execution are wired; live task-family proof is pending.

together.detail: Dynamic catalog, chat, image, video job, TTS, STT, embeddings, and rerank paths are wired; live execution proof is pending.

groq.detail: Dynamic catalog, text, streaming intent, TTS, and STT paths are wired; live execution proof is pending.

genx.detail: Dynamic catalog-selected chat, media generation, streaming contract, async jobs, polling, and artifacts are wired; live proof is pending.

qwen.detail: DashScope International discovery-selected chat, multimodal, image, video, embeddings, streaming intent, and job polling are wired; live proof is pending.

mimo.detail: Token Plan discovery-selected chat and TTS are wired through MIMO_BASE_URL; STT, voice clone, voice design, and omni remain unproven.
